{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-209", "name": "Generation of Error Message Containing Sensitive Information"}], "description": "## Finding

**Location**: `core/src/core/scheduler.ts:23`, `core/src/hooks/dispatcher.ts:100`, `core/src/client/graphql.ts:71`

Several `console.warn` calls are not gated behind `__DEV__` and will fire in production builds, potentially exposing internal framework state such as queue sizes, component names, and query fragments to users viewing the browser console.

## Status

**Open** — These warnings serve as development-time diagnostics. They do not expose credentials or PII, but may reveal internal architecture details.

## Recommendation

Gate all development-time `console.warn` and `console.error` calls behind `process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production'` or a `__DEV__` constant that build tools can tree-shake.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-qcr8-x557-7cp3", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-02T19:03:10Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qcr8-x557-7cp3", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-qcr8-x557-7cp3"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-02T19:03:10Z", "references": ["https://github.com/asymmetric-effort/specifyjs/security/advisories/GHSA-qcr8-x557-7cp3", "https://github.com/asymmetric-effort/specifyjs/commit/2ef791bc73ead853efd0c227ad8228bc594a7b63", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qcr8-x557-7cp3"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/asymmetric-effort/specifyjs/security-advisories/GHSA-qcr8-x557-7cp3", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/asymmetric-effort/specifyjs", "summary": "@asymmetric-effort/specifyjs: Production console warnings may leak internal framework state", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-02T19:03:11Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-qcr8-x557-7cp3", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.2.140", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@asymmetric-effort/specifyjs"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.2.137"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: @asymmetric-effort/specifyjs: Production console warnings may leak internal framework state
